basic_info.title: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty
basic_info.review: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty is a groundbreaking stealth-action masterpiece that revolutionized online multiplayer in games and delivered one of gaming's most ambitious narratives about information control and artificial intelligence. Despite initial controversy over its protagonist switch, it remains a landmark title in interactive storytelling.

alternative_names: メタルギアソリッド2 ソンズ・オブ・リバティ (Japanese)

play_today.details: The definitive original version with exclusive Substance content including the unique skateboarding minigame, superior lighting effects compared to all remasters, and native 60fps performance. This is widely considered by the community and Digital Foundry analysis as having the best visual presentation.

recommended_patches.name: Widescreen Patch
recommended_patches.description: Unlocks 16:9 aspect ratio for modern displays while maintaining gameplay integrity

recommended_patches.name: 60 FPS Patch (PS2)
recommended_patches.description: Ensures consistent 60fps performance in all sections including cutscenes

optimal_settings: EE Cycle Rate: 100% or higher for performance
Enhanced menu and UI textures from HD Collection

play_today.details: Modern PC version with community mods that restore and enhance the experience. While Digital Foundry notes this runs at fixed 720p without AA by default, MGSHDFix provides comprehensive improvements including custom resolutions, ultrawide support, and bug fixes.

recommended_patches.name: MGSHDFix v2.4+
recommended_patches.description: Essential fix adding custom resolutions, ultrawide support, fixes crashes and resolution scaling bugs, broken water reflections, restores skyboxes, and enables mod support

recommended_patches.name: HD Textures AI Slop Mod
recommended_patches.description: Upscales textures to 4K while preserving original art style

recommended_patches.name: MGS2MCAudioFix
recommended_patches.description: Restores proper audio quality and fixes audio sync issues

play_today.details: The original 2003 PC port based on the Xbox version. Requires V's Fix for proper functionality, widescreen support, and bug fixes. This version lacks the PS2-exclusive skateboarding mode.

recommended_patches.name: V's Fix v1.8+
recommended_patches.description: Comprehensive unofficial fix correcting all major and minor flaws in the original PC port including widescreen support, controller fixes, audio issues, and performance optimizations

recommended_patches.name: Widescreen Fix by nemesis2000
recommended_patches.description: Enables 16:9 aspect ratio for the original PC version

play_today.details: The 2011 HD remaster based on the Xbox version. Lacks PS2-exclusive content like skateboarding mode and has inferior lighting compared to original PS2 version according to Digital Foundry analysis.

play_today.platform: Nintendo Switch / PS4 / Xbox One (Master Collection)
play_today.details: 2023 Master Collection version. Digital Foundry analysis reveals this runs at fixed 720p on PC with zero anti-aliasing, and Switch version is capped at 30fps with frame drops below target in MGS2 sections. PS5/Series X versions offer better AA but still inferior to original PS2 lighting.

recommended_patches.name: MGSHDFix (PC version only)
recommended_patches.description: For PC Master Collection users: adds custom resolutions and fixes visual issues

description.synopsis: Set in 2007-2009, Metal Gear Solid 2 follows both Solid Snake and the new protagonist Raiden as they infiltrate the Big Shell oil rig to stop a terrorist group called the Sons of Liberty. The game explores themes of information control, artificial intelligence, and the nature of truth through one of gaming's most ambitious narratives.
key_features: Revolutionary online multiplayer mode for PS2
Innovative codec communication system with AI characters
Multiple endings based on player choices
Substance expansion with exclusive content including skateboarding minigame
Groundbreaking narrative about information control and digital identity
description.long_description: Metal Gear Solid 2: Sons of Liberty, developed by Konami Computer Entertainment Japan under the direction of Hideo Kojima, was released in November 2001 for PlayStation 2. The game initially faced controversy due to its protagonist switch from Solid Snake to Raiden, but has since been recognized as a visionary work that anticipated modern concerns about information control, surveillance, and artificial intelligence. The expanded 'Substance' edition added new missions, the exclusive PS2 skateboarding minigame (a tie-in with Evolution Skateboarding), and additional gameplay modes. Digital Foundry's technical analysis confirms that while later remasters improved resolution, the original PS2 version maintains superior lighting effects and visual presentation compared to all subsequent versions. The Master Collection (2023) runs at fixed 720p on PC without anti-aliasing by default, though community mods like MGSHDFix provide comprehensive fixes for custom resolutions and ultrawide support.
legacy_and_impact: Pioneered online multiplayer in console stealth games
Considered one of the most ambitious narratives in gaming history
Influenced countless games with its information control themes
The skateboarding minigame became a cult favorite among fans
Continues to be studied for its prescient commentary on digital surveillance and AI
